stories.title: US market today: Strong US jobs data complicates any Kevin Warsh push for lower rates

This volatility stemmed from macroeconomic pressures and speculative unwinding, not fundamental weakness. Despite its diminished safe-haven status, strong industrial demand, particularly in green tech, and persistent supply deficits offer long-term support.

stories.summary: Indian investors can now access global markets easily. Tokenization converts real-world assets into digital tokens. This allows fractional ownership of international stocks like Tesla and Apple. It offers diversification beyond domestic savings. India's digital payment success positions it for this new financial era. Meaningful participation in global finance is now within reach for everyone.

Precautionary balances are set to reach $35.9 billion by 2026.  The IMF will maintain its lending rate margin at 60 basis points for member countries.

stories.title: Citi downgrades India to 'Underweight' amid earnings and geopolitical risks

Plane with 231 flyers runs over jaywalker, engine catches fire
stories.summary: A Frontier Airlines flight bound for Los Angeles struck and killed a pedestrian who had jumped the airport's perimeter fence and was crossing the runway during takeoff. The incident sparked an engine fire, prompting the evacuation of 224 passengers and seven crew members. Minor injuries were reported among passengers, and authorities are investigating the fatal event.

stories.title: Keir Starmer appoints former Labour PM Gordon Brown as adviser after election flop
stories.summary: Following significant local election losses, Labour leader Keir Starmer has appointed former Prime Minister Gordon Brown as a special envoy. This move comes amidst calls for Starmer's resignation from some party MPs, while voters express dissatisfaction with economic issues and immigration. Reform UK and the Greens have seen substantial gains in the polls.

stories.title: Vatican softens towards LGBTQ+ Catholics
stories.summary: Pope Leo XIV's Vatican is signaling a nuanced approach to LGBTQ+ Catholics, embracing dialogue while maintaining traditional stances on same-sex blessings. A recent Vatican report highlighted testimonies from gay Catholics, emphasizing social justice over sexual morality. This move has drawn praise from advocates and criticism from conservatives, underscoring the ongoing internal church debate.

stories.title: Three PIOs found guilty of Canada couple's murder
stories.summary: Three Indian-origin men have been convicted of first-degree murder in Canada for the killing of Arnold and Joanne De Jong in Abbotsford in May 2022. The court found Gurkaran Singh, Abhijeet Singh, and Khushveer Toor played an integral role in the murders, which prosecutors stated were jointly planned for robbery.

stories.title: Hantavirus may've spread to remote island
stories.summary: Health officials are working to contain a potential hantavirus spread after two new suspected cases emerged far from the cruise ship where the outbreak began.
